mapper.sql: select r.invest_id, r.dept_id, r.period_id, r.investor_id, r.investor_name, r.invest_amount, r.invest_time, r.del_flag, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark from fin_invest_record r
mapper.select: select ifnull(sum(invest_amount),0) from fin_invest_record where del_flag='0' and dept_id=#{deptId}
select ifnull(sum(invest_amount),0) from fin_invest_record where dept_id=#{deptId} and del_flag='0'
mapper.insert: insert into fin_invest_record(dept_id, period_id, investor_id, investor_name, invest_amount, invest_time, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{deptId}, #{periodId}, #{investorId}, #{investorName}, #{investAmount}, #{investTime}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: update fin_invest_record set del_flag='2' where invest_id=#{investId}
update fin_invest_record set del_flag='2' where invest_id in #{investId}
